description:
Branch coverage is below threshold in several handlers:
- `packages/core/src/handlers/compare.ts` at ~58.82% branch coverage
- `packages/core/src/handlers/benchmark.ts` at ~73.17% branch coverage

**Fix:** Add error-path and edge-case tests in the corresponding test files:
- `tests/handlers/compare.test.ts` — missing component in base branch, empty component list
- `tests/handlers/benchmark.ts` — CDN fetch failure, package not found
- `tests/handlers/suggest.ts` — component with no members, no description

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `compare.ts` branch coverage ≥ 75%
- `benchmark.ts` branch coverage ≥ 75%
- `pnpm test:coverage` shows green across all thresholds
- All new tests pass
title: fix: add edge case tests for suggest, benchmark, and compare handlers
